# Listrr

Content source backed by [Listrr](https://listrr.pro). Configured list IDs are polled and
their contents requested in Riven.

Movie and show lists are configured separately — a list ID in the wrong field will not
resolve.

<!-- BEGIN GENERATED -->
<!-- Generated by `cargo run --bin gen-docs` from each plugin's `settings_schema()`. Do not edit this block by hand. -->

**Category:** Services

### Events

Subscribes to:

- `riven.content-service.requested`

### Settings

Set via environment variables prefixed with `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__LISTRR__`, or in the settings UI.

| Setting | Environment variable | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `apikey` | `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__LISTRR__apikey` | secret | Yes | — | — |
| `movielists` | `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__LISTRR__movielists` | text | No | — | Comma-separated Listrr movie list IDs. |
| `showlists` | `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__LISTRR__showlists` | text | No | — | Comma-separated Listrr show list IDs. |
<!-- END GENERATED -->
